positive: Minimalist, vector-style illustration of a stylized crescent moon and constellation map overlaid on a faint, geometric celestial sphere. The design should feature negative space contrast, utilizing deep midnight blue and metallic gold accents against a neutral cream background. The constellation lines should be clean, thin, and abstract, forming recognizable, yet non-literal, celestial shapes. Composition must be centralized, forming a strong, scalable emblem suitable for chest placement on apparel. High contrast, clean silhouettes, graphic novel aesthetic, perfect for silkscreen printing.
